steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The example specifies “a count of other scholars' citations” — this word is the decisive clue showing we must tally or list references to evaluate importance.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Enumerate means to count or list items one by one. The other choices — abridge (shorten), transpose (rearrange), and circumvent (avoid) — don't express the idea of counting at all. That matches choice C — C is correct.
